title: 秋華賞の後に・絶えず前へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove gives it her all, but unfortunately is
unable to become Triple Tiara champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the same, Air Groove's performance astounds
Mejiro Dober and she becomes the younger
Umamusume's ideal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove is happy to hear that Mejiro Dober
wishes to aspire to surpass her. She pulls herself
together and also aims for greater heights.
